title: Action Sheet Configuration
description: Configuration interface for action sheet appearance and behavior. This interface defines all the properties that can be used to customize the action sheet component, including title, content, items, and interaction options.

props.name: title
props.description: The title displayed at the top of the action sheet (optional).

props.name: subTitle
props.description: Optional subtitle displayed below the main title.

props.name: closeButton
props.description: Whether to show a close button in the action sheet header.

props.name: header
props.description: Whether to show the header section of the action sheet.

props.name: data
props.description: Additional data that can be passed to the action sheet.

props.name: closeOnBackdropClick
props.description: Whether the action sheet should close when clicking outside of it.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of action sheet items to display in the list.

props.name: content
props.description: Custom content to display in the action sheet, either as a template reference or component type.

props.name: draggable
props.description: Whether the action sheet can be dragged by the user.

props.name: dragUp
props.description: Whether the action sheet can be dragged upward to expand to full screen.
